title: FACE RECOGNITION, USE MATERIALS, AND CLONE REQUESTS FOR JOURNALISM CLASS (Alameda County Sheriff's Office)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All complaints regarding the [TK] park received through the park's email portal from January 1 2025, through February 23, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

ROBERT RINCON

title: Face recognition agreements, training, and use materials (Alameda County Sheriff's Office)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

This is a public records request being submitted under California Public Records Act.

I hereby request the following records related to this agency’s use of any face recognition platform, including but not limited to any system over which this agency does not maintain primary ownership but to which members of the agency have access or any platform that enables face recognition:

1. AGREEMENTS and CONTRACTS
Any and all agreements (including related amendments, attachments, and exhibits) related to the acquisition and use of this "software," algorithm, or program.

2. INSTRUCTIONAL MATERIALS and TRAINING
All instructional materials, presentations and presentation materials and other guidance on the use of "the software." Responsive materials include recorded video and audio, PowerPoint files, prepared remarks, and slides. This also includes training material governing the use, sharing, or access to the "software" or any data related to or collected by the face recognition software/technology, including the legal standard that is required before using the technology.

3. PRIVACY ASSESSMENTS
A copy of any data retention guidelines or policies or other materials evaluating or guiding the security of the "software" or the privacy of the data involved.

4. USE POLICIES 
Please provide a copy of any policy directives, guidance documents, memoranda, training materials, or similar records governing the use and function of this technology for any law enforcement purpose. Responsive materials include all those related to data retention, permissible and impermissible use, and security standards.

5. USE LOGS
All logs documenting the use of and searched conducted using the face recognition system for the period from August 1, 2025 through February 23, 2026. 

This is a request being made in the public interest and not for commercial motives.

If your office anticipates that it will need to charge fees for the processing of this request, please inform me of the estimated costs to fulfill this request in advance of fully processing this request.

Please provide these materials to me electronically, if possible.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response in accordance with the dictates of the public records law.

Sincerely,

ROBERT RINCON

All instructional materials, presentations and presentation materials and other guidance on the use of "the software." Responsive materials include recorded video and audio, PowerPoint files, prepared remarks, and slides. This also includes training material governing the use, sharing, or access to the "software" or any data related to or collected by the face recognition software/technology, including the legal standard that is required before using the technology.

3. PRIVACY ASSESSMENTS
A copy of any data retention guidelines or policies or other materials evaluating or guiding the security of the "software" or the privacy of the data involved.

4. USE POLICIES 
Please provide a copy of any policy directives, guidance documents, memoranda, training materials, or similar records governing the use and function of this technology for any law enforcement purpose. Responsive materials include all those related to data retention, permissible and impermissible use, and security standards.

5. USE LOGS
All logs documenting the use of and searched conducted using the face recognition system for the period from August 1, 2025 through February 23, 2026. 

This is a request being made in the public interest and not for commercial motives.

If your office anticipates that it will need to charge fees for the processing of this request, please inform me of the estimated costs to fulfill this request in advance of fully processing this request.

Please provide these materials to me electronically, if possible.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response in accordance with the dictates of the public records law.

Sincerely,

Dave Maass

title: Yosemite National Park Records (DIO, National Park Service - Yosemite)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All complaints regarding Yosemite received through the park's email portal from January 1, 2025, through February 23, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

ROBERT RINCON
